channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Gill tells Newsmax Democrats surrendered party to socialists
item.description: Rep. Brandon Gill, R-Texas, said on Newsmax that Democrats have ceded control of their party to its socialist faction and will face consequences in the midterm elections.

item.title: Trump administration pledges $150M in aid, sends Navy ships after deadly Venezuela quakes
item.description: The Trump administration has pledged $150 million in aid and deployed U.S. Navy warships to Venezuela following deadly earthquakes that killed at least 235 people.

item.title: Socialist-backed primary winner suggested America deserved 9/11 in old video
item.description: Aber Kawas, a New York City Democratic nominee backed by Mayor Zohran Mamdani, is facing backlash after a resurfaced clip appeared to show her suggesting America deserved the 9/11 attacks.

item.title: Slotkin says Democratic Party needs new leadership, old models failing
item.description: Senator Elissa Slotkin has called for new leadership in the Democratic Party, stating that old models are no longer effective and the party must simplify its message to regain voters.
